name: Crabmeat Au Gratin, I
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute vegetables in butter until well done, but not brown.
2. Blend flour well into the mixture.
3. Pour in milk gradually and stir constantly.
4. Add egg yolk, salt, red and black peppers; cook for 5 minutes.
5. Add crabmeat to sauce and blend well.
6. Transfer to a lightly greased casserole dish.
7. Sprinkle top with cheese.
8. Bake at 375°F until light brown (15-20 minutes).
